purpose: Generic ingest regressions for target identity extraction and corpus crosswalks.

fixtures.source_pattern: Multiple sources use one target name for different tasks scores events thresholds populations or timing relations and treat recurrence of the name as evidence for one object.
A target is generated by an explicit algorithm model standard apparatus or reconstruction procedure with stated variables conditions uncertainty and reproducibility limits.

Divergent operationalizations or effects are protected by calling the target complex multidimensional heterogeneous context-dependent or task-impure without identifying variables that generate and predict the divergence.
A source measures one exact relation validly while using it to claim a broader named target whose identity or transport remains unclosed.
